data.title: As a practitioner, I can reference a shared bug report template so agents have a consistent format to follow
data.description:
## Done Definitions

- bug-report-template.md exists at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/ with Required sections (Expected Behavior, Actual Behavior) and Optional sections (Technical Environment, Action History and Workarounds, Logs, Additional Details)
- Logs section includes 30K truncation guidance with ticket comment overflow instruction
- Template specifies structured title format [Component]: [Condition] -> [Observed Result] with component hierarchy (Tool/Skill -> File/Path -> Logical Workflow)
- Template incorporates Zero Inference rule (no root cause speculation, no hindsight bias, no forced debugging, no low-value tickets)

## Scope

In: Template file creation with all required and optional sections, title format spec, Zero Inference rule, 30K guidance.
Out: CLI validation, skill creation, test creation.

## Escalation Policy

Autonomous — Agents proceed with best judgment at all times. Reasonable assumptions are made and documented. No escalation for uncertainty.
